title: cydonia cathayensis
parts: Cydonia cathayensis has many medicinal parts, such as its bark, leaves, roots, and flowers. The bark of the Cydonia cathayensis plant is known to contain flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which have been used to treat various health issues. The leaves of this plant contain tannins, saponins, and terpenoids, which have been traditionally used to treat fever, inflammation, and digestive problems. The roots and flowers of Cydonia cathayensis contain glycosides and essential oils, respectively, which have been used to treat cardiovascular diseases and respiratory issues.
